title: CPU spike on core distribution switch — San Jose
description: sj-core-01 (Catalyst 9500, San Jose core) is reporting sustained CPU utilization of 94% for the past 18 minutes. BGP and STP convergence are degraded. All downstream access switches (including sj-catalyst-01) uplink through this device. Root cause is unknown — no recent config changes logged.

ground_truth.root_cause: Unknown process pid=14847 consuming 24% CPU, identity unresolved
ground_truth.blast_radius: All downstream devices in San Jose site
